fact_nuggets.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Sandsear Storm inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of burning the target. Pokemon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 5 Agile Strong Power 95 75 115 Accuracy 80% 80% 90% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 30% 30% 50% Turns 3 2 4 ? ? Inflicts the target with burn Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Sandsear Storm's PP was raised to 10 and its base power was increased to 100. It now has a 20% chance to burn each target. In battles with multiple opponents, Sandsear Storm targets all adjacent opponents. When used during rain , Sandsear Storm bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . Sandsear Storm is a wind move .
